TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Rod_Arrants, title = Rod_Arrants, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rod_Arrants} }

S.FORM: Rod Arrants kawas tay 1944, ryax sa tay 5 nqu tay 9, Rod Arrants, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Rod Arrants kawas tay 1944, ryax sa tay 5 nqu tay 9, Rod Arrants, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ro* arrants~ɕ kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, ro* arrants~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
